name: Yummy Eggplant-Patlilya
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and shallots, cooking until softened.
3. Stir in the minced garlic and chopped eggplant, sautéing until the mixture is quite dry.
4. Mix in the tomato paste and stir to combine thoroughly.
5. Simmer the mixture on low heat until it thickens and almost sticks to the pan, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Season with salt, freshly ground pepper, 1 tablespoon sugar, and 3 tablespoons lemon juice.
7. Allow the sauce to cool completely.
8. Serve over greens with a garnish of chopped hardboiled egg yolks and whites, chopped onion, parsley, and lemon slices.
9. Optionally drizzle with olive oil and garnish with sesame seeds or lemon basil before serving on bread or crisp toast.
